rag_rules: Preserve the existing AADL architecture by inserting AGREE annex blocks only in valid component type or implementation scopes
Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes, and implementation-level bindings in implementation annexes
generic_rules: Use the authoritative AADL model structure for component names, ports, and connections
Do not modify the AADL architecture; only insert AGREE annex blocks in valid scopes
Preserve existing subcomponents and connections when inserting AGREE annex blocks
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Component type annexes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations
Implementation annexes are for implementation-level bindings
anti_patterns: Do not place assumptions or guarantees in implementation annexes
Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes
irrelevant_topics: AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables
